info.title: Enterprise IP Exchange Web Services
info.description: It lists the API to exchange data through job.

get.summary: Get the exports data. The content depends on the exports processing.

get.description: Start checkin. Files exist only as temporary construction components of imports.
get.summary: Retrieve url, ticket and fileids for files upload.
Get the imports data. The content depends on the imports processing.

headerlg.name: Accept-Language
headerlg.description: specifies the language for any error messages that have translations. Must be in accordance with the rfc 7231

headerauthorization.name: Authorization
headerauthorization.description: Needed for agent ONLY : basic data for agent where data is AgentID:AgentPassword converted in base64.

headerrequestedwith.name: X-Requested-With
headerrequestedwith.description: Protect against Cross Site Forgery - Set to batch

typefileurls.name: responseFilter
typefileurls.description: resultFiles to get the files computed by the export. reportFiles to understand how the export behaved.

typefileids-imports.name: responseFilter
typefileids-imports.description: all or reportFilesUrls to get report files. importFilesUrls to get input file urls instead of input fileIds.

jobStatus.name: jobStatus
jobStatus.description: Select the job list by status.

skip.name: skip
skip.description: Number of files urls to skip.

top.name: top
top.description: Number of files urls to read.

maxNumberOfFiles.name: maxNumberOfFiles
maxNumberOfFiles.description: Maximum number of file to upload in DFS.

uploadCorrelation.description: import FileIds to store in job

201-family.description: New exchangejob created and submitted. The current exchangejob already ended.

201-family-imports.description: New exchangejobs created and submitted. The current exchangejobs has already ended.

202.description: Partial results. The source could not be extracted because of a server time out.

example.errormsg: Too large number of files 233. It must be lower than 100.

jobsInputUpdate.description: Update the input of the job before its submission.

version.description: Version number. Must be set to 2.1 for the new input payload. This will ensure the compatibility with the previous payloads.

selectorMode.description: Default value is false and authorized values are true or false.

version.description: Version number. Must be set to 1.0 for the new input payload. This will ensure the compatibility with the future payloads.

selectorMode.description: Default value is false and authorized values are true or false.

retried.description: false or true if a manual retry has been done.

retryIdentifier.description: additionnal identifier to distinguish the retried jobs

creationDate.description: Date of the user submission with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. The time is UTC.

submissionDate.description: Date of the user submission with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. The time is UTC.

startDate.description: Date of the execution start with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. The time is UTC.

endDate.description: Date of the execution end with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. The time is UTC.

time to keep.description: Time in hours before the job is removed.

time to live.description: Time in minutes before the job execution is stopped.

status.description: Job execution status such as succeeded, failed.

computeError.description: Compute execution status only seen in case of failure.

retried.description: false or true if retry has been done.

retryIdentifier.description: additionnal identifier to distinguish the retried jobs

creationDate.description: Date of the user submission with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. Time is UTC.

submissionDate.description: Date of the user submission with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. Time is UTC.

startDate.description: Date of the execution start with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. Time is UTC.

endDate.description: Date of the execution end with format yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSS. Time is UTC.

time to keep.description: Time in hours before the job is removed.

time to live.description: Time in minutes before the job execution is stopped.

status.description: Job execution status such as succeeded, failed.

computeError.description: Compute execution status such as succeeded, failed.

inputurl.description: Urls of the input files. Output depending on the reponseFilter.
Identifiers of the input files. Output depending on the reponseFilter.

parameters.description: Optional. Only necessary to define an option different than the default value or an expand value. If no expandDepth option, no expand will be applied. If no geometricalFormat option, no stream attached to the Product Structure will be exported.If no withFiles option, no file attached to the Document will be exported.

expandDepth.description: Optional, 0 to n, -1 for expand all, no expand if no option

withFiles.description: Optional only for Document. Possible values are Yes or No (Default).

geometricalFormats.description: Optional and only for engineering to get geometry

type.description: Possible values are Part or Drawing.

onlySynchronizedDerivedOutputFiles.description: Optional - Export only synchronized derived output.

applicativeCompletionOptions.description: Optional and only for Engineering domain

with3DShapes.description: to complete with all 3DShapes, by default no 3DShape exported except those from 3DPart.

withDrawings.description: to complete with all drawings, by default no drawing exported.

withDocuments.description: to complete with all documents, by default no document exported.

nativeCADPreference.description: A CAD for which native data will be exported for only Part, Drawing or both. Possible values : CATIAV5, NX, SOLIDEDGE, INVENTOR (2d), AUTOCAD, CREO, SOLIDWORKS, DRAFTSIGHT (2d)

format.description: If type is Part : value is STEP, STEP_AP203, STEP_AP214 or PDF if 2D Layout is attached. If type is Drawing : value is PDF.
